pt-BR.title: Kit AI Maturity Assessment · Paula Silva
pt-BR.description: Kit auto-servico para conduzir o AI Maturity Assessment com GitHub Copilot. 3 surveys complementares, 5 PDFs production-quality, plano de capacitacao personalizado.

brand.name: Paula Silva
brand.tagline: Building the future of software development with AI and Agentic DevOps

footer.aboutText: Kit auto-servico para conduzir assessment de maturidade IA com GitHub Copilot, 3 surveys complementares e 5 PDFs executivos.
footer.legal: GitHub Copilot e Azure sao produtos da Microsoft. Este kit e um pacote cliente auto-servico para assessment, coleta e geracao de relatorios executivos.

hero.lede: Conduza o assessment de maturidade IA da sua organizacao sem depender da plataforma web. 3 surveys complementares, pipeline orquestrado por skills custom, 5 PDFs executivos production-quality e plano de capacitacao com nomes e emails dos inscritos.

cardRows.title: Wizard customizavel
cardRows.subtitle: RACI, ADKAR, Quick Wins via HTML / JSON

pipeline.title: Pipeline em uma linha
pipeline.lede: Voce preenche um JSON ou Excel do Microsoft Forms. O agente concierge invoca as skills em ordem. Em aproximadamente 5 minutos voce tem os 5 PDFs production-quality prontos para apresentar.

surveys.title: 3 surveys complementares
surveys.lede: Rode 1, 2 ou os 3 baseado no objetivo. Cada survey informa o proximo, e o agente concierge cruza os resultados automaticamente.

cards.title: AI Maturity Assessment
cards.subtitle: Organizacional · leadership-driven · Likert L0 a L4

cards.title: Developer Survey
cards.subtitle: Anonimo · comportamental · 7 dimensoes D2-D8
items: Copilot · modos Ask / Edit / Agent / Coding Agent

quickstart.title: Quick start
quickstart.lede: Nao exige plataforma web nem instalacao complexa. Funciona direto no VS Code com GitHub Copilot Chat em modo Agent.

steps.title: Baixar e abrir
steps.body: Baixe o ZIP publicado a partir da branch main, extraia a pasta, abra no VS Code e valide pre-requisitos com smoke test.

steps.title: Preencher respostas
steps.body: Edite respostas.json manualmente ou importe Excel do Microsoft Forms multi-respondente.
steps.command:
cp respostas.json.example respostas.json
# edite levels (0-4) por questao
# ou: cole respostas-forms.xlsx na raiz

steps.title: Rodar o pipeline
steps.body: Copilot Chat em modo Agent. Use o concierge ou o orquestrador direto.

skills.title: Comandos do Copilot Chat
skills.lede: Cada skill executa uma etapa do pipeline. O agente concierge detecta o estado do workspace e invoca a proxima skill na ordem certa.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lede: Duvidas mais comuns nos primeiros 15 minutos com o kit.

items.summary: Qual survey devo rodar primeiro?
items.answerHtml: Para consultoria seria, rode os 3 nessa ordem: Developer Survey anonimo, Learning Survey identificado, Assessment principal com lideranca informada. Para baseline rapido apenas do board, rode so o Assessment principal. O agente @ai-maturity-assistant te guia na escolha.

items.summary: Os comandos /calcular-scores e /gap-analysis nao aparecem ao digitar /
items.answerHtml: Copilot Chat precisa estar em modo Agent. Clique no dropdown ao lado do icone do Copilot e escolha Agent. Se ainda nao aparecer, recarregue a janela do VS Code com Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+P e Developer: Reload Window.

items.summary: Copilot Free funciona ou preciso de Pro / Business / Enterprise?
items.answerHtml: Skills custom funcionam no Free com limites de mensagens. Para o fluxo completo, com 158 perguntas, 5 PDFs e cross-survey, recomendamos Copilot Pro, Business ou Enterprise. Confirme com sua org se ha restricoes de skills custom em planos enterprise.

items.summary: Tem dados de exemplo para testar sem preencher tudo?
items.answerHtml: Sim. O kit vem com respostas.json.example, Cliente Exemplo S.A. com 46 respostas mockadas, e respondentes mock para os 2 surveys. Rode cp respostas.json.example respostas.json e depois /pipeline-completo para ver o output completo em aproximadamente 3 minutos.

items.summary: Como agrego respostas de multiplos respondentes do Forms?
items.answerHtml: A skill /importar-respostas-excel faz media automatica por questao quando o Excel tem multiplas linhas. Mesmo comportamento da plataforma web. Minimo recomendado: 3 respondentes para o assessment principal, 5 para o Developer Survey.

items.summary: Preciso instalar dependencias Python?
items.answerHtml: Sim, apenas 3: jinja2, weasyprint e openpyxl. Rode make install-deps ou pip install jinja2 weasyprint openpyxl. No macOS o WeasyPrint precisa de brew install pango; no Linux/WSL, do pacote libpango-1.0-0.

items.summary: Posso customizar o branding dos PDFs?
items.answerHtml: O kit usa a identidade paulasilva-ms, com paleta Microsoft 4 cores. Para customizar, edite relatorios/scripts/branding.py com suas constantes e re-renderize. Os 5 templates Jinja2 em relatorios/templates/ consomem essas variaveis automaticamente.

items.summary: Como funciona a integracao entre os 3 surveys?
items.answerHtml: Cada survey output alimenta o proximo: o Learning Survey gera um plano que o wizard auto-fill modo D usa para popular 6 dos 9 inputs do Implementation Guide. O Developer Survey calcula maturidade real por dimensao, cruzavel com a maturidade declarada da lideranca no PDF de Score Justification.

download.title: Baixe o kit agora
download.lede: Baixe o pacote publicado a partir da branch main. O cliente nao precisa acessar o repositorio GitHub para usar o kit.

about.title: Who built this, and why.
paragraphs: I am Paula Silva, Software Global Black Belt. My work sits between platform engineering, AI infrastructure, and the practical reality of helping teams adopt GitHub Copilot, Azure, and agentic development at enterprise scale.

The AI Maturity Assessment Kit packages the assessment workflow into a client-run experience: three surveys, auditable scoring, gap analysis, strategy recommendations, and executive reports that can be generated without waiting for a web platform.

It is designed to help leaders and developer teams build a shared view of maturity, training needs, governance gaps, and quick wins while keeping the process transparent, reproducible, and ready for client adaptation.

en.title: AI Maturity Assessment Kit · Paula Silva
en.description: Self-service kit to run the AI Maturity Assessment with GitHub Copilot. 3 complementary surveys, 5 production-quality PDFs, personalized capacitation roadmap.

brand.name: Paula Silva
brand.tagline: Building the future of software development with AI and Agentic DevOps

footer.aboutText: Self-service kit for running an AI maturity assessment with GitHub Copilot, 3 complementary surveys, and 5 executive PDFs.
footer.legal: GitHub Copilot and Azure are Microsoft products. This kit is a client-run self-service package for assessment, collection, and executive report generation.

hero.lede: Run your organization's AI maturity assessment without depending on a web platform. 3 complementary surveys, a pipeline orchestrated by custom skills, 5 production-quality executive PDFs, and a capacitation plan with attendee names and emails.

cardRows.title: Customizable wizard
cardRows.subtitle: RACI, ADKAR, Quick Wins via HTML / JSON

pipeline.title: Pipeline in one line
pipeline.lede: You fill a JSON or Microsoft Forms Excel. The concierge agent invokes the skills in order. In about 5 minutes you get the 5 production-quality PDFs ready to present.

surveys.title: 3 complementary surveys
surveys.lede: Run 1, 2, or all 3 based on your goal. Each survey informs the next, and the concierge agent cross-validates the results automatically.

cards.title: AI Maturity Assessment
cards.subtitle: Organizational · leadership-driven · Likert L0 to L4

cards.title: Developer Survey
cards.subtitle: Anonymous · behavioral · 7 dimensions D2-D8
items: Copilot · Ask / Edit / Agent / Coding Agent modes

quickstart.title: Quick start
quickstart.lede: No web platform required, no complex install. Runs straight in VS Code with GitHub Copilot Chat in Agent mode.

steps.title: Download and open
steps.body: Download the ZIP published from the main branch, extract the folder, open it in VS Code, and validate prerequisites with smoke test.
steps.command:
# from the extracted folder
make smoke

steps.title: Fill responses
steps.body: Edit respostas.json manually or import Microsoft Forms Excel for multiple respondents.
steps.command:
cp respostas.json.example respostas.json
# edit levels (0-4) per question
# or: drop respostas-forms.xlsx at root

steps.title: Run the pipeline
steps.body: Copilot Chat in Agent mode. Use the concierge or the direct orchestrator.

skills.title: Copilot Chat commands
skills.lede: Each skill runs one pipeline step. The concierge agent detects workspace state and invokes the next skill in the right order.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lede: Most common questions in the first 15 minutes with the kit.

items.summary: Which survey should I run first?
items.answerHtml: For serious consulting, run all 3 in this order: Developer Survey anonymous, Learning Survey identified, then the main Assessment with informed leadership. For a quick board baseline, run only the main Assessment. The @ai-maturity-assistant agent guides the choice.

items.summary: The /calcular-scores and /gap-analysis commands do not appear when I type /
items.answerHtml: Copilot Chat needs to be in Agent mode. Click the dropdown next to the Copilot icon and pick Agent. If it still does not show, reload the VS Code window with Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+P and Developer: Reload Window.

items.summary: Does Copilot Free work or do I need Pro / Business / Enterprise?
items.answerHtml: Custom skills work on Free with message limits. For the full flow, with 158 questions, 5 PDFs, and cross-survey, we recommend Copilot Pro, Business, or Enterprise. Confirm with your org if there are restrictions on custom skills in enterprise plans.

items.summary: Are there sample data to test without filling everything?
items.answerHtml: Yes. The kit ships with respostas.json.example, Cliente Exemplo S.A. with 46 mocked responses, and mock respondents for the 2 surveys. Run cp respostas.json.example respostas.json, then /pipeline-completo to see the complete output in about 3 minutes.

items.summary: How do I aggregate multiple Forms respondents?
items.answerHtml: The /importar-respostas-excel skill does automatic mean per question when the Excel has multiple rows. Same behavior as the web platform. Recommended minimum: 3 respondents for the main assessment, 5 for the Developer Survey.

items.summary: Do I need to install Python dependencies?
items.answerHtml: Yes, only 3: jinja2, weasyprint, and openpyxl. Run make install-deps or pip install jinja2 weasyprint openpyxl. On macOS WeasyPrint also needs brew install pango; on Linux/WSL, the libpango-1.0-0 package.

items.summary: Can I customize the PDF branding?
items.answerHtml: The kit uses the paulasilva-ms identity with the Microsoft 4-color palette. To customize, edit relatorios/scripts/branding.py with your constants and re-render. The 5 Jinja2 templates in relatorios/templates/ consume these variables automatically.

items.summary: How do the 3 surveys integrate?
items.answerHtml: Each survey output feeds the next: the Learning Survey generates a plan that the wizard auto-fill mode D uses to populate 6 of the 9 Implementation Guide inputs. The Developer Survey computes real maturity per dimension, cross-checkable against leadership-declared maturity in the Score Justification PDF.

download.title: Download the kit now
download.lede: Download the package published from the main branch. Clients do not need GitHub repository access to use the kit.

paragraphs: I am Paula Silva, Software Global Black Belt. My work sits between platform engineering, AI infrastructure, and the practical reality of helping teams adopt GitHub Copilot, Azure, and agentic development at enterprise scale.

The AI Maturity Assessment Kit packages the assessment workflow into a client-run experience: three surveys, auditable scoring, gap analysis, strategy recommendations, and executive reports that can be generated without waiting for a web platform.

It is designed to help leaders and developer teams build a shared view of maturity, training needs, governance gaps, and quick wins while keeping the process transparent, reproducible, and ready for client adaptation.

quickstart.title: Inicio rapido
quickstart.lede: No requiere plataforma web ni instalacion compleja. Funciona directo en VS Code con GitHub Copilot Chat en modo Agent.

steps.title: Descargar y abrir
steps.body: Descarga el ZIP publicado desde la branch main, extrae la carpeta, abre en VS Code y valida prerequisitos con smoke test.
steps.command:
# desde la carpeta extraida
make smoke

steps.title: Llenar respuestas
steps.body: Edita respostas.json manualmente o importa Excel del Microsoft Forms multi-respondente.
steps.command:
cp respostas.json.example respostas.json
# edita levels (0-4) por pregunta
# o: pega respostas-forms.xlsx en la raiz

steps.title: Ejecutar el pipeline
steps.body: Copilot Chat en modo Agent. Usa el concierge o el orquestador directo.

skills.title: Comandos de Copilot Chat
skills.lede: Cada skill ejecuta una etapa del pipeline. El agente concierge detecta el estado del workspace e invoca la siguiente skill en el orden correcto.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lede: Dudas mas comunes en los primeros 15 minutos con el kit.

items.summary: Cual encuesta debo ejecutar primero?
items.answerHtml: Para consultoria seria, ejecuta las 3 en este orden: Developer Survey anonimo, Learning Survey identificado, y Assessment principal con liderazgo informado. Para baseline rapido del board, ejecuta solo el Assessment principal. El agente @ai-maturity-assistant te guia en la eleccion.

items.summary: Los comandos /calcular-scores y /gap-analysis no aparecen al escribir /
items.answerHtml: Copilot Chat necesita estar en modo Agent. Haz clic en el dropdown junto al icono de Copilot y elige Agent. Si aun no aparece, recarga la ventana de VS Code con Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+P y Developer: Reload Window.

items.summary: Copilot Free funciona o necesito Pro / Business / Enterprise?
items.answerHtml: Las skills custom funcionan en Free con limites de mensajes. Para el flujo completo, con 158 preguntas, 5 PDFs y cross-survey, recomendamos Copilot Pro, Business o Enterprise. Confirma con tu organizacion si hay restricciones a skills custom en planes enterprise.

items.summary: Hay datos de ejemplo para probar sin llenar todo?
items.answerHtml: Si. El kit incluye respostas.json.example, Cliente Exemplo S.A. con 46 respuestas simuladas, y respondentes mock para las 2 encuestas. Ejecuta cp respostas.json.example respostas.json y luego /pipeline-completo para ver el output completo en aproximadamente 3 minutos.

items.summary: Como agrego multiples respondentes del Forms?
items.answerHtml: La skill /importar-respostas-excel hace promedio automatico por pregunta cuando el Excel tiene multiples filas. Mismo comportamiento que la plataforma web. Minimo recomendado: 3 respondentes para el assessment principal, 5 para el Developer Survey.

items.summary: Necesito instalar dependencias de Python?
items.answerHtml: Si, solo 3: jinja2, weasyprint y openpyxl. Ejecuta make install-deps o pip install jinja2 weasyprint openpyxl. En macOS WeasyPrint ademas necesita brew install pango; en Linux/WSL, el paquete libpango-1.0-0.

items.summary: Puedo personalizar el branding de los PDFs?
items.answerHtml: El kit usa la identidad paulasilva-ms, con paleta Microsoft 4 colores. Para personalizar, edita relatorios/scripts/branding.py con tus constantes y re-renderiza. Los 5 templates Jinja2 en relatorios/templates/ consumen estas variables automaticamente.

items.summary: Como se integran las 3 encuestas?
items.answerHtml: Cada output alimenta el siguiente: la Learning Survey genera un plan que el wizard auto-fill modo D usa para llenar 6 de los 9 inputs del Implementation Guide. La Developer Survey calcula madurez real por dimension, cruzable contra la madurez declarada por el liderazgo en el PDF de Score Justification.

download.title: Descarga el kit ahora
download.lede: Descarga el paquete publicado desde la branch main. El cliente no necesita acceso al repositorio GitHub para usar el kit.

paragraphs: I am Paula Silva, Software Global Black Belt. My work sits between platform engineering, AI infrastructure, and the practical reality of helping teams adopt GitHub Copilot, Azure, and agentic development at enterprise scale.

The AI Maturity Assessment Kit packages the assessment workflow into a client-run experience: three surveys, auditable scoring, gap analysis, strategy recommendations, and executive reports that can be generated without waiting for a web platform.

It is designed to help leaders and developer teams build a shared view of maturity, training needs, governance gaps, and quick wins while keeping the process transparent, reproducible, and ready for client adaptation.
